meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] ［＃大文字］ is a single-line absolute-font-size marker (the postfix headline form, §6.17 scale 特大>大>中>本文>小), governing the rest of its line — a zero-width marker node like この行はゴシック体, not a wrapping container. §8 renders . Corpus: one work (暗黒公使) with an in-text editor note defining the 4-level scheme; 47 postfix occurrences. Offsets from the §4 byte model.
